name: Conjuration
tagline: Summon a bonded companion creature to fight and act at your side.

baseAbility.name: Summon Companion
baseAbility.description: Standard action, 1 SP. Summon your bonded companion into an adjacent open square; it acts on your next turn onward. Lasts while you concentrate, or spend 1 SP to sustain it for 1 min/CL without concentration. You gain a single companion (with one base form talent) the moment you gain this sphere; if it drops to 0 HP it vanishes for the day. The companion's stats scale off your Hit Dice/caster level, and it can pick up talents and archetypes of its own over time.

talents.name: Greater Summoning
talents.description: Your companion, once summoned for a full day, only disappears when you rest — you can dismiss and re-summon it freely that day at no extra cost.

talents.name: Extra Companion
talents.description: Gain an additional companion (with its own base form talent). Repeatable.

talents.name: Lingering Companion
talents.description: Companion sticks around for a few extra rounds after you stop concentrating.

talents.name: Link
talents.description: Share senses or communicate with your companion at range; lets you perceive through it.

talents.name: Battle Creature (form)
talents.description: Companion form talent: grants your companion a scaling weapon-like natural attack and combat competence.

talents.name: Armored Companion (form)
talents.description: Companion form talent: grants your companion a scaling natural armor bonus.

talents.name: Quick Companion (form)
talents.description: Companion form talent: increases your companion's speed and reflexes.

talents.name: Magical Companion (form)
talents.description: Companion form talent: grants your companion a small casting pool of its own, drawing on a sphere you possess.

talents.name: Shield Bearer (form)
talents.description: Companion form talent: grants your companion a shield and the ability to protect you or allies.

talents.name: Planar Creature (form)
talents.description: Companion form talent: grants your companion an outsider-flavored resistance package and a subtype of your choice.
